docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT SANDRA MEJIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED APR-08-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, SANDRA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $698.68 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, SANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
